evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/auth.spec.ts and its POM file pages/login-page.ts. Find any anti-patterns, weak assertions, or quality issues.
evals.expected_output: Should detect: test.only (P0), waitForTimeout (P1), dangling locator (P0), one-shot boolean (P0), conditional bypass (P0), force:true (P1), .catch(()=>{}) in POM (P0), raw DOM query in POM (P1), name-assertion mismatch (P0), missing then (P0), YAGNI unused POM members (P2), hardcoded credentials (P1), direct page.click API usage (P1)
assertions: Detects test.only on line 5 (#7, P0)
Detects waitForTimeout(2000) on line 16 (#9, P1)
Detects dangling locator page.locator('.login-form') on line 24 with no assertion or await (#8a, P0)
Detects one-shot boolean: isVisible() piped to toBeTruthy() on lines 17-18 (#4, P0)
Detects conditional bypass: if(await page.locator..isVisible()) gates assertion on line 48 (#5a, P0)
Detects force:true on page.click('.logout-btn') line 39 without JUSTIFIED comment (#5b, P1)
Detects .catch(() => {}) in POM goto() line 32 swallowing networkidle failure (#3, P0)
Detects raw DOM query document.querySelector in POM waitForDashboard() line 51 (#6, P1)
Flags name-assertion mismatch: 'should show user profile' only checks .user-avatar visibility, not profile info (#1, P0)
Flags missing then: 'should logout' doesn't verify session cleared or dashboard gone (#2, P0)
Identifies YAGNI: rememberMeCheckbox, forgotPasswordLink, socialLoginGoogle, socialLoginGithub, captchaWidget, termsCheckbox unused in auth.spec.ts (#11, P2)
Detects hardcoded credentials 'admin'/'password123' on lines 8, 30 (#14, P1)
Flags direct page.click() on line 39 — prefer locator.click() (#17, P1)
Does NOT flag page.goto('/reset-password') on line 45 as missing auth — public route (#12)
Does NOT flag page.goto('/dashboard') on line 22 as missing auth in redirect test — testing the redirect itself
Structured output with P0/P1/P2
Summary table included
Top Priorities section included

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/dashboard.spec.ts. Identify all anti-patterns and suggest improvements.
evals.expected_output: Should detect: serial() (P1), >=0 always-passing (P0), waitForTimeout (P1), missing assertion (P0), toBeAttached (P0), boolean discarded (P0), positional selectors (P1), raw DOM query (P1), missing then (P0), name-assertion mismatch (P0), missing auth setup (P0), direct page action API usage (P1)
assertions: Detects test.describe.serial on line 3 — breaks parallel sharding (#10b, P1)
Detects toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0) on line 8 — always passes regardless of content (#4, P0)
Detects waitForTimeout(3000) on line 15 (#9, P1)
Detects toBeAttached() on line 30 — weak assertion, element just needs to exist in DOM (#4, P0)
Detects boolean discarded: await badge.isVisible() on line 36 with result unused (#8b, P0)
Detects positional selector .first() on line 28 and .nth(2) on line 29 (#10a, P1)
Detects raw DOM query document.querySelector in evaluate() on line 49 (#6, P1)
Flags direct page.click() on lines 13-14, 21-22 (#17, P1)
Flags missing auth setup: all tests navigate to /dashboard without login or storageState (#12, P0)
Flags name-assertion mismatch: 'display correct user name' uses querySelector truthiness, doesn't check actual name (#1, P0)
Flags missing then: 'export dashboard as PDF' just clicks export buttons, no download verification (#2, P0)
Flags missing then: 'toggle sidebar' checks sidebar hidden but not that main content expanded (#2, P0)
Does NOT flag page.locator('.chart-container').toBeVisible() on line 16 as always-passing — toBeVisible is a proper web-first assertion
Structured output with P0/P1/P2
Summary table included
Top Priorities section included

evals.prompt: Review all Playwright test files in evals/files/ including POM files. Give me a full quality audit with severity ratings.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive report covering all spec files and POM files. Finds issues across all checks. Summary table with P0/P1/P2 counts. Coverage gap suggestions referencing specific findings. Cross-file YAGNI analysis. Systemic issues section. Top priorities.
assertions: Reviews all 3 spec files
Reviews both POM files
Detects try/catch error swallowing in settings.spec.ts line 9-13: wraps toBeVisible assertion and logs instead of failing (#3, P0)
Flags name-assertion mismatch: settings 'change password' only checks .password-section visible, not that password actually changed (#1, P0)
Flags missing assertion: settings 'toggle email notifications' clicks toggle with zero assertions (#2, P0)
Detects toBeAttached() in settings line 49 (#4, P0)
Detects one-shot getAttribute('src').toBeTruthy() in settings line 50 (#4, P0)
Detects one-shot URL: expect(page.url()).toContain on settings line 42 — no auto-retry (#4h, P0)
Detects inconsistent POM usage in settings: SettingsPage imported but spec uses raw page.fill/page.click for password, toggle, delete (#13, P1)
Detects hardcoded credentials in auth lines 8, 30 (#14, P1)
Detects missing auth setup in dashboard — no login before /dashboard (#12, P0)
YAGNI in settings-page.ts: themeSelector, languageDropdown, timezoneDropdown, twoFactorToggle, backupCodesButton, cancelButton and their methods unused (#11, P2)
YAGNI in login-page.ts: rememberMeCheckbox, forgotPasswordLink, socialLoginGoogle, socialLoginGithub, captchaWidget, termsCheckbox unused (#11, P2)
Coverage gap suggestions reference specific findings (Phase 3)
Phase 2.5 systemic issues section present
Summary table with counts
Top Priorities section included
Total 20+ issues found

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/checkout.spec.ts and its POM file pages/checkout-page.ts. Find any anti-patterns or quality issues.
evals.expected_output: Clean, well-written tests. Minimal or no P0/P1 findings. Should recognize good practices: beforeEach, getByTestId/getByRole, storageState auth, env vars for credentials, test.skip with reason. Should NOT flag: test.skip with reason comment, JUSTIFIED nth() usage in POM. May suggest minor improvements but should not produce false positives.
assertions: Does NOT flag test.skip on line 54 as #7 — has valid JIRA-4521 reason
Does NOT flag nth() in checkout-page.ts line 38 — has JUSTIFIED comment above
Does NOT flag process.env.TEST_COUPON or process.env.TEST_SHIPPING_NAME as hardcoded credentials
Does NOT produce false positives on getByTestId/getByRole/getByLabel assertions
Reports zero or near-zero P0 issues
Recognizes good practices: getByTestId, getByRole, getByLabel, env vars, beforeEach, storageState auth
Summary table included
Coverage gap suggestions present

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/search-justified.spec.ts. Check for anti-patterns and respect JUSTIFIED suppression markers.
evals.expected_output: Should skip patterns with JUSTIFIED comments above them (first() in search results, force:true on filter). Should flag: unjustified nth() on pagination, waitForTimeout without justification. Should not flag locator-based page.locator usage patterns.
assertions: Skips JUSTIFIED first() on line 20-21: comment explains results are server-ordered
Skips JUSTIFIED force:true on line 27-28: comment explains custom overlay intercepting pointer events
Flags unjustified .nth(2) on pagination line 39 — no JUSTIFIED comment above (#10a, P1)
Flags waitForTimeout(500) on line 53 — should use auto-wait for suggestions (#9, P1)
Does NOT flag page.locator('#x').fill() as direct page action usage — locator-based API is correct
Does NOT over-flag: clean tests (special characters, clear-and-reset) should have zero or minimal findings
Structured output with P0/P1/P2
Summary table included

evals.prompt: Review the Cypress E2E tests in evals/files/products.cy.ts. Identify all anti-patterns and suggest improvements.
evals.expected_output: Should detect Cypress framework via Phase 0. Should detect: it.only (P0), cy.wait numeric sleeps (P1), dangling cy.get (P0), conditional assertion bypass (P0), force:true without justification (P1), name-assertion mismatch on add-to-cart (P0), missing then on product details (P0). Should skip Playwright-specific checks.
assertions: Detects Cypress framework in Phase 0 — uses describe/it/cy.* not Playwright
Detects it.only on line 18 (#7, P0)
Detects cy.wait(2000) on line 20, cy.wait(1500) on line 26, cy.wait(1000) on line 44 — numeric sleeps (#9b, P1)
Flags dangling cy.get('.product-card') on line 14 — no assertion chain, no action (#8, P0)
Flags conditional assertion bypass: if(Cypress.env('SHOW_EMPTY_STATE')) on line 57 — test passes vacuously when env not set (#5a, P0)
Flags force:true on #apply-discount click line 72 without JUSTIFIED comment (#5b, P1)
Flags name-assertion mismatch: 'add product to cart' on line 31 only clicks, doesn't verify cart updated (#1, P0)
Flags missing assertion: 'show product details' line 36 assigns cy.get to const but no should() chain (#2, P0)
Skips Playwright-specific checks (dangling page.locator, describe.serial, missing await)
Does NOT flag cy.get('.product-price').first() on line 45 as dangling — it is chained with .invoke('text')
Does NOT flag the sort comparison logic (lines 45-50) as an anti-pattern — programmatic price comparison is legitimate
Structured output with P0/P1/P2
Summary table included

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/profile-mixed.spec.ts. Find anti-patterns but don't over-flag legitimate try/catch and test.skip usage.
evals.expected_output: Should detect: missing await on expect (#15 P0), missing await on action (#16 P0), direct page.fill/page.click usage (#17 P1), networkidle usage (#9c P1). Should NOT flag: legitimate try/catch in beforeEach (setup retry), test.skip with reason, legitimate try/catch in cleanup (delete address test).
assertions: Detects missing await on expect: line 35 expect(page.locator('.toast-success')).toBeVisible() without await — assertion never runs (#15, P0)
Detects missing await on action: line 41 page.locator('#photo-upload').setInputFiles() without await — upload may never execute (#16, P0)
Flags direct page.fill on line 48 and page.click on line 49 — prefer locator.fill/locator.click (#17, P1)
Detects networkidle on line 56: waitForLoadState('networkidle') is unreliable (#9c, P1)
Does NOT flag try/catch in beforeEach lines 11-17 — legitimate retry for network timeout, not around assertions
Does NOT flag test.skip on line 25 — has valid TEAM-892 tracking reason
Does NOT flag try/catch in delete-address test lines 67-70 — best-effort cleanup, not assertion swallowing
Structured output with P0/P1/P2
Summary table included
